LOAD_WAIT_MS - Static variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Time to wait for Firebase event data to load into the screen.
LOAD_WAIT_MS - Static variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventDetailsActivityTest
Time to wait for Firebase event data to load into the screen.
LOAD_WAIT_MS - Static variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragmentTest
Time to wait for Firestore data to load.
loadEntrantLocations() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EventMapActivity
Queries Firebase Firestore for the "waitingList" subcollection of the current event.
loadEvent() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
Fetches the event data from Firestore and populates the UI.
loadEventCapacity() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragment
Loads the event capacity from Firestore.
loadEventForEditing() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
Fetches the event from Firebase using the event ID and fills the input fields with the existing event information so it can be edited.
loadEventHistory() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EventHistory
 
loadInvitedEntrants() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.InvitedFragment
Loads all entrants with status "Invited" from Firestore.
loadNotificationLogs() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.admin.NotificationLogsActivity
Uses a Collection Group query to fetch all documents in any collection named "notifications" across the entire database, sorted by time.
loadNotifications() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity
Attaches a real-time snapshot listener to the user's notifications collection in Firestore.
loadProfile() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.ProfileActivity
Fetches the user's existing profile data from the Firestore collection using their device ID and populates the EditText fields if a profile exists.
loadProfileInfo(String, int) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.CancelledFragment
Fetches profile data for a single cancelled entrant from the profiles collection.
loadProfileInfo(String, int) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EnrolledFragment
Fetches profile data for a single enrolled entrant from the profiles collection.
loadProfileInfo(String, int) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.InvitedFragment
Fetches the entrant's profile info from Firestore using their device ID.
loadProfileInfo(String, int) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragment
Fetches the entrant's profile name from Firestore using their device ID.
loadProfileName(String, int) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EntrantListActivity
Fetches the entrant's profile name from Firestore using their device ID.
loadUserProfile() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity
Retrieves the current user's profile information from Firestore using their device ID and stores it in the currentProfile variable.
loadWaitlistEntrants() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EntrantListActivity
Fetches all entrants from the selected event's waiting list collection in Firestore.
loadWaitlistEntrants() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragment
Fetches all entrants from the selected event's waiting list collection in Firestore.
